goals.title: Remove or archive issue-specific PER/QA gate/report-generator workflo...
goals.objective: Remove or archive issue-specific PER/QA gate/report-generator workflows and scripts that only create .omx report artifacts or stale release checklists.
goals.evidence: Removed issue-specific gate workflows/scripts/tests/docs: release packaging operator, transport parity, multi-mode matrix, security/privacy generator, UI release preflight; rg found no active refs to deleted gate scripts or QA/PER gate names under .github/apps/packages/scripts/tests/docs.

goals.title: Preserve useful behavior by converting it into normal tests, package...
goals.objective: Preserve useful behavior by converting it into normal tests, package scripts, or clear CI jobs.
goals.evidence: Converted useful one-off coverage into durable scripts/tests: test:accessibility, test:resilience, mesh transport E2E, android:preflight, ios:preflight/policy, renamed reports to package/.artifacts paths; validation passed for SDK resilience, UI accessibility, mesh E2E, Tauri preflights, and sidecar profile tests.

goals.title: CI should be organized around actual durable lanes: lint/format/gener...
goals.objective: CI should be organized around actual durable lanes: lint/format/generated-config checks, Python unit tests, integration tests, e2e tests, process-mode Redis tests, frontend/SDK checks, Tauri desktop/mobile verification, SDK/backend conformance, Docker build validation, performance/benchmarks, and release packaging where real.
goals.evidence: Consolidated workflows into durable lanes: quality.yml, python-tests.yml, e2e.yml, frontend-sdk.yml, performance.yml, docker-build.yml, release.yml, Tauri desktop/android/iOS checks, SDK conformance; YAML parse check passed for all workflow files.

goals.title: Remove stale workflow clutter and misleading names, especially releas...
goals.objective: Remove stale workflow clutter and misleading names, especially release-packaging operator gates, transport parity gates, PER/QA matrix/preflight report generators, and tests that only assert generated report shape.
goals.evidence: Removed stale workflow clutter and misleading names: deleted old issue-gate workflows/scripts/tests/docs, renamed release-gate scripts to android-preflight/ios-preflight, renamed QA/PER docs/tests to durable names, and rg found no active stale refs under .github/apps/packages/scripts/tests/docs.

goals.title: Keep useful build/developer scripts such as sidecar preparation, back...
goals.objective: Keep useful build/developer scripts such as sidecar preparation, backend inventory/conformance, process-mode/docker/Tilt helpers, and real smoke tests.
goals.evidence: Preserved useful build/developer scripts: prepare-sidecar profiles, build.py sidecar packaging, SDK backend inventory/conformance workflow/scripts, mesh transport harness, process-mode tests, docker service matrix, Tauri EventStream/desktop/mobile smokes; validation included sidecar profile tests and Tauri preflight scripts.

goals.title: Update docs to describe simple standard local and CI commands.
goals.objective: Update docs to describe simple standard local and CI commands.
goals.evidence: Updated docs for simple standard local/CI commands: docs/CI_CD.md, .github/workflows/README.md, converted accessibility/resilience docs, SDK conformance docs, Mesh E2E harness docs, and Tauri desktop build docs reference the durable workflows and local commands.

goals.objective: Preserve existing smart Tauri sidecar packaging work and avoid package signing scope.
goals.evidence: Preserved smart Tauri sidecar packaging and unsigned-by-default profile builds while completing CI consolidation; final verification passed (YAML parse, compose config, stale ref scan, SDK/UI/Tauri tests/typechecks, mesh E2E, sidecar profile tests, py_compile/ruff, cargo check from src-tauri); independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR; quality gate JSON /tmp/ci-cleanup-quality-gate.json.
